reviews.review_msg: She's very organized with learning objectives and doesn't test on onything not seen in class. Lectures seem heavy but are really condensed. Weekly quizzes to study for. She's very nice and wants to help. Class attendance is necessary for notes and assignments. In addition she's also very attractive.

She knows her stuff, and is generally very helpful. But you must follow her outline to the letter to get full points. Also expects you to put an honest effort into projects and papers rather than just getting answers right! (which I think is more important anyway.)
